candidates.why: This is an explicit D&A component within the Cost of sales bucket, but the selected parent rows 'Cost of sales' / 'Cost of revenues/COGS' are total COGS lines that already include this component, so adding it separately would double count.
This is an explicit amortization component within the Cost of sales bucket, but it appears to be included in the selected total COGS rows, so it should not be added separately.

variables.notes: The selected COGS rows are total COGS lines. 'Other Cost of sales' plus the two D&A component rows reconciles to the selected total, indicating depreciation and amortization are already embedded.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation in Selling and administrative expenses
candidates.why: This is an explicit D&A component under the SG&A bucket, but the selected parent row 'Selling and administrative expenses' is the total SG&A line and already appears to include this component, so it should not be added separately.
This row is the relevant SG&A amortization label, but it has no visible values in the excerpt and does not indicate a separate add-back amount to extract.

variables.notes: The selected XSGA_COMPONENTS row is the total 'Selling and administrative expenses' line. The visible depreciation row appears to be a sub-component within that total, and the amortization row is blank, so no separate SG&A D&A row should be added.
